channel.title: News - English [KBS WORLD Radio] | International
channel.description: We provide you with the latest news from home and abroad, in addition to in-depth analysis on major issues, with a close eye on Northeast Asia and the Korean Peninsula in particular.

item.title: Trump: No Need for Xi's Help for Iran
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump says he will have a long talk with Chinese President Xi Jinping about the war in Iran. Speaking to reporters ahead of his trip to Beijing on Tuesday, Trump however claimed that he is not going to need Xi's help over Iran.  [Sound bite: US President Donald ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump: No Need for Xi's Help for Iran

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Top Office: S. Korea Closely Communicating with Int’l Community to Ensure Safe Passage in Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
[International] :
National security adviser Wi Sung-lac says South Korea is actively taking part in the international community’s discussions on cooperation to ensure safe passage for ships in the Strait of Hormuz and is closely communicating with relevant countries.  Wi made the remarks on Wednesday in a keynote speech ...

[more...]

image.title: Top Office: S. Korea Closely Communicating with Int’l Community to Ensure Safe Passage in Strait of Hormuz

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump to Arrive in Beijing for 3-Day State Visit, Summit with Xi
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump is set to arrive in Beijing on Wednesday for a three-day state visit, nine years after his previous visit during his first term in office. After landing at Beijing Capital International Airport on Wednesday night, Trump is scheduled to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping at the ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump to Arrive in Beijing for 3-Day State Visit, Summit with Xi

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Reuters: 1 of 3 Tankers that Exited Strait of Hormuz Tied to S. Korean Shipping Company
item.description:
[International] :
Three tankers carrying crude, one of them with ties to a South Korean shipping company, have reportedly escaped the Strait of Hormuz after turning off their trackers to avoid attacks. Citing shipping data from Kpler and the London Stock Exchange Group on Monday, Reuters said one of the tankers was VLCC ...

[more...]

image.title: Reuters: 1 of 3 Tankers that Exited Strait of Hormuz Tied to S. Korean Shipping Company

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump Ramps Up Pressure on Iran to End War, Considers Renewing ‘Project Freedom’
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump has ramped up pressure on Iran to accept the terms of a U.S. proposal to end the war, saying the monthlong ceasefire is on “massive life support.” Speaking to reporters at the Oval Office on Monday, Trump referred to Iran’s counterproposal as a “piece of garbage” and ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Ramps Up Pressure on Iran to End War, Considers Renewing ‘Project Freedom’

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Iran Stays Silent after S. Korean Probe Concludes HMM Namu Attacked in Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
[International] :
Anchor: The Iranian government has remained virtually silent on the situation surrounding the HMM Namu, the South Korean-operated cargo ship that was struck by two objects in the Strait of Hormuz last week. Amid suspicion over the incident’s cause, other vessels have reported being hit in the besieged ...

[more...]

image.title: Iran Stays Silent after S. Korean Probe Concludes HMM Namu Attacked in Strait of Hormuz

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Envoys from US, China to Hold Pre-Summit Negotiations in Seoul
item.description:
[International] :
High-level envoys from the United States and China are set to hold last-minute negotiations in South Korea ahead of their leaders’ summit in Beijing on Thursday. U.S. Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent announced on X on Sunday that he planned to depart Monday for “a quick series of meetings” in ...

[more...]

image.title: Envoys from US, China to Hold Pre-Summit Negotiations in Seoul

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump, Xi to Hold Summit Talks in Beijing on Thursday
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping will hold summit talks in Beijing on Thursday, as Trump is set to embark on his first state visit there since 2017. In a press briefing Sunday, White House deputy press secretary Anna Kelly said Trump is scheduled to land in Beijing on Wednesday ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump, Xi to Hold Summit Talks in Beijing on Thursday

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump Turns Down Iran’s Response to U.S. Proposal, Calls It ‘Totally Unacceptable’
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump has rejected Iran’s response to a U.S. proposal to end the war, calling it “totally unacceptable.” Trump made the announcement on Truth Social on Sunday, saying he’d just read the response and didn’t like it, but he did not elaborate. Though Trump had expected to ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Turns Down Iran’s Response to U.S. Proposal, Calls It ‘Totally Unacceptable’

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Defense Minister Sees No Obstacles to Speeding Up OPCON Transfer
item.description:
[International] :
Defense Minister Ahn Gyu‑back said South Korea and the United States have prepared for the transfer of wartime operational control (OPCON) in a systematic and stable manner, adding that he sees no major obstacles to accelerating the process. Ahn made the remarks to reporters Sunday at Incheon ...

[more...]

image.title: Defense Minister Sees No Obstacles to Speeding Up OPCON Transfer

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: US Awaits Iran Response to Proposed Peace Deal
item.description:
[International] :
Iran has yet to issue an official response to the United States-proposed peace deal as negotiations over ending the conflict continue. U.S. President Donald Trump said on Friday he expected to receive Iran's response to the proposal by that night, U.S. time, but neither side has released an official ...

[more...]

image.title: US Awaits Iran Response to Proposed Peace Deal

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Industry Minister Discusses Investment, Shipbuilding Cooperation in US Visit
item.description:
[International] :
Industry Minister Kim Jung-kwan met with U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick and other senior officials to discuss ways to strengthen cooperation on key pending issues, including South Korea's investment in the United States. The Ministry of Industry, Trade and Resources said Sunday that Kim, who visited ...

[more...]

image.title: Industry Minister Discusses Investment, Shipbuilding Cooperation in US Visit

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Record Five People of Korean Descent Elected Local Councillors in UK
item.description:
[International] :
A record high five people of Korean descent were elected local councillors in the United Kingdom. According to the outcome of the local elections for England on Friday, incumbent Labour Party-affiliated councillor Bora Kwon, representing College Park and Old Oak on the Hammersmith and Fulham London ...

[more...]

image.title: Record Five People of Korean Descent Elected Local Councillors in UK

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: US Disables 2 Additional Iran-Flagged Vessels in Gulf of Oman
item.description:
[International] :
The United States has disabled two additional Iranian-flagged vessels in the Gulf of Oman reportedly heading to an Iranian port in violation of an ongoing U.S. blockade. In a press release on Friday, the U.S. Central Command(CENTCOM) said a U.S. Navy F/A-18 Super Hornet from USS George H.W. ...

[more...]

image.title: US Disables 2 Additional Iran-Flagged Vessels in Gulf of Oman

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump Says He Loves S. Korea When Asked about Explosion on S. Korean-Operated Cargo Ship
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump said he loves South Korea, when asked about an explosion and subsequent fire aboard a South Korean-operated cargo ship earlier in the week while being anchored in the Strait of Hormuz. Speaking to reporters at the White House on Friday, Trump said "I love South Korea," when asked ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Says He Loves S. Korea When Asked about Explosion on S. Korean-Operated Cargo Ship

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Fragile US-Iran Ceasefire Tested after Military Exchange in Hormuz
item.description:
[International] :
Anchor: Hopes for peace talks between the United States and Iran have been rattled after the two sides exchanged military strikes on Thursday in and around the Strait of Hormuz, putting their fragile ceasefire under renewed strain. Still, with both sides appearing wary of a full-scale war, all eyes are on ...

[more...]

image.title: Fragile US-Iran Ceasefire Tested after Military Exchange in Hormuz

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump: Ceasefire with Iran Still in Effect, despite Exchange of Fire in Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump says the ceasefire with Iran remains in place, despite the latest exchange of fire between the two sides in the Strait of Hormuz. In a phone interview with ABC News on Thursday, Trump said the U.S. attacks on Iran after it targeted U.S. destroyers in the waterway were a “love ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump: Ceasefire with Iran Still in Effect, despite Exchange of Fire in Strait of Hormuz

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: US Trade Court Rules against Trump’s 10% Global Tariffs
item.description:
[International] :
A U.S. trade court has ruled against U.S. President Donald Trump’s ten percent global tariffs, levied in February after the Supreme Court struck down the sweeping duties he imposed last year under the 1977 International Emergency Economic Powers Act. In a two-to-one ruling Thursday, the three-judge ...

[more...]

image.title: US Trade Court Rules against Trump’s 10% Global Tariffs

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: S. Korea, Japan Hold First Vice Ministerial Security Meeting
item.description:
[International] :
South Korea and Japan have held their inaugural vice-ministerial talks between their foreign and defense ministries, seeking to strengthen cooperation on a range of security issues. According to the South Korean Ministry of Foreign Affairs, officials from both nations held their “two-plus-two” meeting ...

[more...]

image.title: S. Korea, Japan Hold First Vice Ministerial Security Meeting

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump Confident about Prospects of Peace Deal with Iran
item.description:
[International] :
Anchor: U.S. President Donald Trump claims Iran wants a peace deal and has agreed to give up its nuclear weapons. As Pakistan continues to mediate between the two sides, it’s unclear whether Trump’s confidence is grounded in reality. Kim Bum-soo has more.   Report: Speaking to reporters at the ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Confident about Prospects of Peace Deal with Iran

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Disabled HMM Namu to Be Towed to Dubai Port for Full Investigation
item.description:
[International] :
​Anchor: A government team has traveled to the Middle East to investigate an explosion and subsequent fire aboard a South Korean-operated cargo ship anchored in the Strait of Hormuz. The oceans ministry said three investigators from the Korea Maritime Safety Tribunal and four experts from the National Fire ...

[more...]

image.title: Disabled HMM Namu to Be Towed to Dubai Port for Full Investigation

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump: Iran Agrees It Can’t Have Nuclear Weapons; Deal Likely before China Trip
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump says Iran has agreed to Washington’s position that it cannot have nuclear weapons, as the two sides are reportedly negotiating a one-page memorandum of understanding to end their war. Speaking at a White House event on Wednesday, Trump said the two sides had “very good ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump: Iran Agrees It Can’t Have Nuclear Weapons; Deal Likely before China Trip

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Axios: US, Iran Close to Adopting 1-Page Memorandum of Understanding to End War
item.description:
[International] :
The U.S. news website Axios says the U.S. and Iran are close to adopting a memorandum of understanding to end the war. Quoting two U.S. officials and two other sources briefed on the issue, Axios said Wednesday that the two countries are negotiating the one-page, 14-point memorandum, both directly and ...

[more...]

image.title: Axios: US, Iran Close to Adopting 1-Page Memorandum of Understanding to End War

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: French Cargo Ship Struck by Projectile in Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
[International] :
A French-owned cargo ship has been attacked in the Strait of Hormuz, and several crewmembers are injured.   CBS News, citing two U.S. officials, said a cargo ship in the Gulf region was hit by a possible land-attack cruise missile late Tuesday local time.   Several Filipino crewmembers on board were ...

[more...]

image.title: French Cargo Ship Struck by Projectile in Strait of Hormuz

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump Pauses ‘Project Freedom,’ Claims ‘Great Progress’ in Peace Talks with Iran
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump says “great progress” has been made in peace negotiations with Iran and that he is temporarily halting the U.S.-led Project Freedom mission to help secure free passage for vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. On Truth Social on Tuesday, Trump said the decision was based on a ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Pauses ‘Project Freedom,’ Claims ‘Great Progress’ in Peace Talks with Iran

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Hegseth Urges S. Korea, Others to ‘Step Up’ to Help Restore Passage in Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth has urged South Korea and other countries to “step up” to help restore safe passage in the Strait of Hormuz, after an explosion and subsequent fire were reported aboard a South Korean-operated cargo ship in the waterway. During a press conference at the Pentagon on ...

[more...]

image.title: Hegseth Urges S. Korea, Others to ‘Step Up’ to Help Restore Passage in Strait of Hormuz

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump Says Iran Attacked S. Korean Ship, Urges Seoul to Join 'Project Freedom'
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran attacked a South Korean cargo vessel in the Strait of Hormuz and called on South Korea to join a U.S. operation aimed at reopening the waterway. In a social media post on Monday, Trump said, "Iran has taken some shots at unrelated Nations with respect to the Ship ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Says Iran Attacked S. Korean Ship, Urges Seoul to Join 'Project Freedom'

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump: US Will Help ‘Free’ Stranded Ships from Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
[International] :
Anchor: U.S. President Donald Trump says the United States will help “free” ships that have been stranded in the Strait of Hormuz since the start of the war in Iran. Trump said the operation, dubbed “Project Freedom,” would start Monday. Twenty-six South Korean vessels are among the thousands of ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump: US Will Help ‘Free’ Stranded Ships from Strait of Hormuz

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: US to Help Trapped Ships Escape Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump has promised to help "neutral and innocent" ships escape the shut down Strait of Hormuz. Trump stated on Truth Social on Sunday that the U.S. would assist vessels from countries uninvolved in the Middle East crisis, starting Monday, through an initiative called Project ...

[more...]

image.title: US to Help Trapped Ships Escape Strait of Hormuz

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: US Warns of Sanctions for Hormuz Transit Arrangements
item.description:
[International] :
The United States government has warned that shipping companies could face sanctions for paying Iran to secure safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz. According to the Associated Press, the U.S. Treasury Department's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) issued an alert Saturday cautioning that ...

[more...]

image.title: US Warns of Sanctions for Hormuz Transit Arrangements

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio
